description_long: This is a large, military-grade tactical vehicle equipped with four prominent surface-to-air missiles mounted on a raised launch platform at the rear. The vehicle features a robust, angular armored cab with multiple access hatches and reinforced windows, designed for crew protection. It has a six-wheeled chassis with heavy-duty, off-road tires, and visible ventilation grilles along the sides for engine cooling. The missile launch system is elevated and supported by a sturdy framework, with the missiles aligned in parallel and secured in launch tubes. The exterior is finished in a matte, solid green paint, typical of military vehicles, with no visible camouflage patterns or insignia. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability, mobility, and rapid deployment in urban or field environments.
description: A large, armored military vehicle with four surface-to-air missiles mounted on a raised platform and a six-wheeled chassis, finished in matte green. The design emphasizes protection, mobility, and heavy weaponry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four vertically aligned missiles and the armored cab's flat, reinforced front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the raised missile launcher, angular cab, and three large off-road tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the missile launcher and the vehicle's wide, armored body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the missile platform, cab, and three off-road tires.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four missile launch tubes mounted on a raised platform at the rear of the vehicle.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with angular, reinforced panels covering the cab, sides, and rear; thickness appears substantial, with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte green color; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, designed for heavy-duty terrain.
